skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem: A piece of wire with a length of 45 inches is cut into two parts. One part has a length of x inches, and the other part has a length of y inches. The value of x is 6 more than 2 times the value of y. What is the value of x?
rationale: The correct answer is 32. Set up x + y = 45 and x = 2y + 6. Substituting: (2y + 6) + y = 45, so 3y = 39 and y = 13. Then x = 2(13) + 6 = 32.
